role_summary: the finance director focuses on governance, compliance, and financial leadership at the  board level.
responsibilities: • provide strategic financial guidance to the board   • ensure corporate governance and regulatory compliance   • oversee financial reporting and audits   • evaluate major investments and strategic decisions   • strengthen risk management and control frameworks   • represent finance function at executive level
qualifications: • qualified ca   • board -level finance and governance exper ience
